items.title: Kimmeridge Bay
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: Dorset surf spot • Intermediate to Advanced
items.content:
A well-known Dorset reef setup that can produce long, clean waves in the right conditions. Best for confident surfers with reef experience.

  • Vibe: Reefy, rugged and classic Dorset
  • Experience level: Intermediate to Advanced
  • Best conditions: Groundswell with suitable tide; offshore northerly winds; reef awareness essential
  • Access: Walk/access from bay car park; reef and rocks
  • Parking: Paid car park near bay

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Bournemouth Pier
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: Dorset surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
A highly accessible town surf spot that can produce fun waves when swell reaches the bay. Often inconsistent but convenient.

  • Vibe: Urban, accessible and lively
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South/south-west swell; northerly winds; often best in winter storms
  • Access: Very easy seafront access
  • Parking: Town/seafront paid parking

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Boscombe Pier
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: Dorset surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
A popular Bournemouth-area surf check with left and right peaks around the pier area when conditions align.

  • Vibe: Urban, regular and social
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South/south-west swell; northerly winds; check sandbanks
  • Access: Easy seafront access
  • Parking: Seafront/town paid parking

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Southbourne Beach
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: Dorset surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
A quieter alternative to central Bournemouth, with open beach peaks on the right swell. Good for checking when the bay is working.

  • Vibe: Local, open and relaxed
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South/south-west swell; northerly winds; winter swells often best
  • Access: Easy cliff/seafront access via paths/lifts
  • Parking: Seafront/cliff-top parking options

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Branksome Dene
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A gentler Poole/Bournemouth beach option that may suit learners on small clean days. Usually more sheltered and less powerful.

  • Vibe: Gentle, accessible and family-friendly
  • Experience level: Beginner
  • Best conditions: Small south/south-west swell; light offshore winds
  • Access: Easy beach access from chine/car park
  • Parking: Paid parking nearby

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Highcliffe Beach
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: Dorset surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
A scenic Dorset/Hampshire-border surf check with waves in suitable swell. Watch groynes, shorebreak and tide state.

  • Vibe: Scenic, relaxed and cliff-backed
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South/south-west swell; northerly winds; check tide and groynes
  • Access: Access from cliff paths and beach routes
  • Parking: Paid/local parking nearby

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Avon Beach
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A sheltered beach that can provide small waves in the right conditions. Better for gentle practice than consistent surf.

  • Vibe: Sheltered, family-friendly and gentle
  • Experience level: Beginner
  • Best conditions: Larger swell wrapping into Christchurch Bay; light offshore winds
  • Access: Easy seafront access
  • Parking: Paid parking nearby

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Mudeford Sandbank
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A more specialist Christchurch Harbour-area option where access and currents matter. Best treated as a careful conditions check.

  • Vibe: Tidal, sheltered and unusual
  • Experience level: Intermediate
  • Best conditions: Larger swell with correct tide/wind; beware harbour currents
  • Access: Access by ferry/walk depending route; tide matters
  • Parking: Parking at Mudeford/Christchurch options plus onward access

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Swanage Bay
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A sheltered bay that only works occasionally for small surf. More useful for relaxed water time than regular surfing.

  • Vibe: Sheltered, scenic and gentle
  • Experience level: Beginner
  • Best conditions: Rare/large south-easterly or channel swell; light offshore winds
  • Access: Easy town/beach access
  • Parking: Town parking options

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Durlston Bay
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A specialised, less routine surf check near Swanage. Rocks and access mean it is not a beginner-friendly main option.

  • Vibe: Rocky, scenic and condition-dependent
  • Experience level: Intermediate
  • Best conditions: Specific swell windows; check rocks, tide and access
  • Access: Access via paths; conditions must be assessed carefully
  • Parking: Town/country park parking options

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Weymouth Beach
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A sheltered town beach that can occasionally produce small waves. Primarily a beginner-friendly and family beach rather than a consistent surf spot.

  • Vibe: Sheltered, accessible and family-focused
  • Experience level: Beginner
  • Best conditions: Rare/large channel swell; light offshore winds
  • Access: Very easy town seafront access
  • Parking: Town/seafront paid parking

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Chesil Beach
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A steep shingle beach famous for powerful shorebreak. Not suitable for casual beginners and should only be entered in safe, appropriate conditions.

  • Vibe: Powerful, steep and exposed
  • Experience level: Advanced
  • Best conditions: Large swell; serious shorebreak; expert assessment required
  • Access: Access from designated points; shingle beach can be hazardous
  • Parking: Paid/local parking at access points

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Charmouth
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.summary: Dorset surf spot • Beginner to Intermediate
items.content:
A scenic Jurassic Coast beach that can offer small surf in the right conditions. Conditions are variable and cliff safety should be respected.

  • Vibe: Jurassic Coast, scenic and variable
  • Experience level: Beginner to Intermediate
  • Best conditions: South/south-west swell; light northerly winds; check beach and fossils/cliffs zones
  • Access: Easy village/beach access
  • Parking: Paid parking near beach

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.

items.title: Lyme Regis
items.author: CodeSurf Solutions
items.content:
A sheltered bay that occasionally sees small rideable waves. More suited to gentle water sessions than reliable surf.

  • Vibe: Sheltered, historic and gentle
  • Experience level: Beginner
  • Best conditions: Rare/large swell wrapping into the bay; light offshore winds
  • Access: Easy town/seafront access
  • Parking: Town/seafront paid parking

Check surf forecast | Search live webcam | Parking information

Safety note: surf conditions change quickly. Check tide, wind, swell and local lifeguard guidance before entering the water.
